description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine flat_2, and is implemented by a call to flat_2. Use this API to specify various levels of flat conditions in preparation for fault analysis calculations (activity FLAT). This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = flat(options, values)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying boundary condition options. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of two elements specifying boundary condition values (ignored unless OPTIONS(1) is 2). (input).

options.description: set classical fault analysis conditions (activity FLAT,CL).
set conditions in preparation for IEC standard 909 calculations (activity FLAT,IEC).
tap ratio treatment flag (ignored if OPTIONS(1) is 0) (0 by default).
charging treatment flag (ignored if OPTIONS(1) is 0) (0 by default).
shunt treatment flag (ignored if OPTIONS(1) is 0) (0 by default).
set line shunts to 0.0 in the positive (and hence negative) sequence, and fixed and switched shunts to 0.0 in all three sequence networks.
set line shunts, fixed shunts, and switched shunts to 0.0 in all sequence networks, and negative and zero sequence shunt loads to 0.0.

values.description: voltage magnitude for all buses, or 0.0 to use present voltage magnitudes (0.0 by default).
generator power factor, or 0.0 to leave generator Mvar unchanged (0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
